/home/zee/x-tools/aarch64-rpi3-linux-gnu/bin/aarch64-rpi3-linux-gnu-gcc -ffreestanding -nostdlib -nostartfiles -march=armv8-a -O2 -Wall -T /home/zee/ITI_Files/linux/Embedded-Linux/EmbeddedLinux/4_U-boot_BareMetal/linker.ld CMakeFiles/mybaremetalapp.elf.dir/boot.S.obj CMakeFiles/mybaremetalapp.elf.dir/gpio.c.obj CMakeFiles/mybaremetalapp.elf.dir/timer.c.obj CMakeFiles/mybaremetalapp.elf.dir/main.c.obj -o mybaremetalapp.elf
